company: Research Intern on LLM Coding Agents, Programming Systems Group, Uber
text: Researched state-of-the-art LLM-based bug detection approaches. Built an LLM agent knowledge base by mining existing bug reports and encoding domain knowledge. Found 40+ previously unknown logical bugs in Uber internal codebases.
my main responsibilities include threat intelligence operations. This involves analyzing the alerts generated by the alarm system to determine their validity and maintaining and detection rules.
